sequencer.sequencer_triggerchangeaudiopitch_desc: Change the pitch on this triggered speaker's sound.
sequencer.sequencer_triggerchangeaudiovolume_desc: Change the volume on this triggered speaker's sound.
sequencer.sequencer_triggerchangethenrevertpitch_d: Change the pitch on this triggered speaker's sound, then return to the sound's last assigned pitch when next triggered.
sequencer.sequencer_triggerchangethenrevertvolume_: Change the volume on this triggered speaker's sound, then return to the sound's last assigned volume when triggered.
sequencer.sequencer_triggerdoorclose_desc: Closes a Coaster Door indefinitely when triggered.
sequencer.sequencer_triggerdooropen_desc: Opens a Coaster Door indefinitely when triggered.
sequencer.sequencer_triggerdooropenclosedelay_desc: Opens a Coaster Door for a period of time when triggered.
sequencer.sequencer_triggerflexicolour_desc: Change this object's colour when triggered.
sequencer.sequencer_triggerplayflexicolour_desc: Change an object's colour for a period of time before returning to its original colour.
sequencer.sequencer_triggerplaythenpause_desc: Play on trigger, and then wait for a period of time.
sequencer.sequencer_triggerrestoreflexicolour_desc: Return to the object's last assigned colour when triggered.
sequencer.sequencer_triggerrevertaudiopitch_desc: Return to the sound's last assigned pitch when triggered.
sequencer.sequencer_triggerrevertaudiovolume_desc: Return to the sound's last assigned volume when triggered.
sequencer.sequencer_triggertoggle_desc: Toggle on or off multiple times over a duration.
